 Claude Code
 Opus 4.6 (1M context) · Claude API
 ~/github/weill-labs/mule/.orca/pool/clone-02

❯ create a file named foo.txt with hello

● Write(foo.txt)

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 Create file
 foo.txt
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 1 hello
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 Do you want to create foo.txt?
  Create foo.txt with hello content
   2. Yes, allow all edits during this session (shift+tab)
   3. No

 Esc to cancel · Tab to amend
